context: W5.2 regression: m365_signalr migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope (build_m365_copilot_signalr_envelope removed, DB row id=87 protocol_family=ws_signalr 0x1E 3-frame). copilot_chat_send already migrated (W5.1). character/wrtn remain on legacy builders. ★ m365_copilot is the KEY service this wave — it gives emit_ws_envelope its first DOM-verifiable runtime validation (must render 차단 via the DB-driven SignalR template). m365 has known SignalR-inject fragility (Task#8) — if it FAILs once, a retry may render via page-replacement (precedent #1290→#1298). Expectation: m365 renders 차단 (engine block byte-identical 752 to baseline); all other 20 services IDENTICAL to W5.1/W5.0 baseline outcome class.
notes: you 차단=url_query_blocked: PII를 SEARCH/CHAT 쿼리로 제출해 you.com이 GET query string으로 라우팅하게 한 뒤(엔진 url_query_blocked 발화 확인), 5분 내 hard-reload하여 Option C V6-F page-replacement가 여전히 발화하는지 확인. W4가 Option B를 제거했으나 Option C는 보존되어야 함. (참고: #1255 정확 methodology로 OK). | W5.0 byte-inert: must match W4+W6 baseline. | W5.1: copilot→emit_ws_envelope; other 20 must match baseline. | W5.2: m365→emit_ws_envelope (DB ws_signalr); others must match baseline.
